---
title: "D. Directory Migration (DM_\\*)"
subtitle: "Eight adapter interfaces for every infrastructure service AD was holding together"
doc-type: subcategory-landing
pillar: modernization
sub-category: D
status: scaffold
date: 2026-04-24
aspirational: true
---

# D. Directory Migration (DM_\*) {.unnumbered}

Active Directory was the implicit governance anchor for eleven categories
of infrastructure objects. When AD goes away, each must be migrated to a
modern equivalent with governance preserved. DM_* adapters define the
interface; vendor implementations plug in underneath.

## Leaves

| ID | Adapter | Status |
|---|---|---|
| **D.1** | IPAM Adapter — DM_010 | Source present |
| **D.2** | DNS Adapter — DM_015 | ⚠ *gap — not in registry* |
| **D.3** | DHCP Adapter — DM_016 | ⚠ *gap* |
| **D.4** | PKI / ADCS Adapter — DM_020 | Source present |
| **D.5** | RADIUS / NPS Adapter — DM_030 | Source present |
| **D.6** | LDAP Proxy Adapter — DM_040 | Source present |
| **D.7** | Sync Engine Adapter — DM_050 | Source present |
| **D.8** | Device Management Adapter — DM_060 | Source present |
| **D.9** | NTP Adapter — DM_070 | Source present |
| **D.10** | DFS Adapter — DM_080 | Source present |
| **D.11** | SPN / App Registration — DM_085 | ⚠ *gap* |
| **D.12** | Trust Relationship — DM_090 | ⚠ *gap* |

Canon surface: [modernization/directory-migration.qmd](../../../modernization/directory-migration.qmd)
